references.text: [Va99] Various, Some of Paul's favorite problems. Booklet produced for the conference "Paul Erd\H{o}s and his mathematics", Budapest, July 1999 (1999).

remarks.text: This is given in \cite{Va99} as a problem of Erd\H{o}s and Tur\'{a}n. I have reproduced the problem verbatim; I am not entirely sure what it is asking for.

statement.text: Describe (by statistical means) the arithmetic structure of the orders of subgroups of $S_n$.
